title: Moving Files
drDigitalIntro: Once you have folders, you can move files into them. There are three ways: drag a file into a folder (click and drag), cut and paste (Command+X to cut, Command+V to paste), or use the sidebar to move files by dragging them to a folder. When a file is inside a folder, it's still on your computer — it's just organized.

playgroundTask.instructions: Move each file into the correct folder.

drDigitalSuccess: Perfectly organized! Photos, documents, and downloads all in their right place.
drDigitalHint: .jpg and .png are image files (Photos), .pdf and .docx are documents, and installers go in Downloads.
